requirement: Memory models must be defined outside execution engine modules.
implementation: core/memory/models.py defines all 16 dataclasses/enums in core/memory/ — outside core/runtime/ and core/execution_engine.py.
evidence: core/memory/models.py contains MemoryLayer, MemoryEntry, SkillNode, FailurePattern, ContextWindow, etc.

requirement: Every operation must be recoverable via cognitive_trace_id.
implementation: All MemoryHierarchy, ContextCompiler, SkillGraphManager, and MemoryStateMachine methods accept and propagate cognitive_trace_id.
evidence: CognitiveTraceCorrelator generates cog_<SHA256> IDs; record_memory_store() links operations to traces; all store/prune/record methods return cognitive_trace_id.

requirement: No global mutable dicts. Tenant state must be instance-scoped.
implementation: MemoryHierarchy._entries is a per-instance dict keyed by (tenant_id, layer, key). SkillGraphManager._skills/_failure_patterns are per-instance. No module-level mutable state.
evidence: Two MemoryHierarchy instances share zero state. store()/retrieve()/prune() all filter by tenant_id. IsolationViolation raised on empty tenant_id.

requirement: Same inputs must produce same retrieval results and same context hash.
implementation: get_context_window() computes SHA-256 from tenant_id + window data. compress_trace_to_context() produces deterministic _hash via ContextWindow.__post_init__.
evidence: test_deterministic_context_hash: two MemoryHierarchy instances with same tenant data produce same context_hash. test_deterministic_hash: same trace+tenant+budget produces same _hash.

requirement: Cross-tenant context access must be guarded by scope_verified flag.
implementation: ContextCompiler returns safety_bounds with cross_tenant_scope_verified=False by default. MemoryStateMachine G-M3 blocks cross-tenant transitions without scope_verified=True.
evidence: test_cross_tenant_blocked verifies scope_verified is False in returned context. G-M3 guard returns BLOCK when tenant mismatch without scope_verified.

requirement: Memory module must not import from ExecutionCore or runtime layers.
implementation: core/memory/*.py imports only from core.memory.models, standard library (hashlib, json, time, uuid, decimal), and typing. No imports from core/runtime/, core/execution_engine.py, or core/interfaces/.
evidence: grep -r 'from core.(runtime|execution)' core/memory/*.py returns zero matches.

requirement: Every memory component must implement a protocol/interface.
implementation: MemoryHierarchy → IMemoryHierarchy, ContextCompiler → IContextCompiler, SkillGraphManager → ISkillGraphManager. Protocols defined in artifacts/design/phase_l/protocols/01_cognitive_memory_protocols.py.
evidence: All three classes implement all protocol methods. Protocols use @runtime_checkable.

requirement: Same sequence of operations must produce same correlation state.
implementation: CognitiveTraceCorrelator uses deterministic SHA-256 generation. MemoryStateMachine.transition() is idempotent for same inputs. ContextWindow._hash computed from deterministic fields.
evidence: test_verify_full_propagation: same cognitive_trace_id + same stores → same trace chain. MemoryStateMachine.full_lifecycle: same sequence produces same state transitions.

canon_rule: STOP CONDITION 1: Empty tenant_id in store/retrieve
implementation: MemoryHierarchy.store() and retrieve() both check 'if not tenant_id: raise IsolationViolation()' as first line after async.

canon_rule: STOP CONDITION 2: Cross-tenant leak in retrieve
requirement: Tenant A must never see Tenant B's data.
implementation: retrieve() scopes by _entries.get(tenant_id, {}).get(layer.value, {}). Isolated at dict level.
evidence: test_tenant_isolation confirms ten_b sees zero results for ten_a data.

canon_rule: STOP CONDITION 3: Unguarded pruning affecting other tenants
requirement: Prune must only affect target tenant's entries.
evidence: test_prune_respects_tenant: ten_b data survives after pruning ten_a.

requirement: No module-level dict used for state.
implementation: All state is instance-scoped (_entries in MemoryHierarchy, _skills in SkillGraphManager, _traces in CognitiveTraceCorrelator, _history in MemoryStateMachine).
evidence: Manual inspection of all core/memory/*.py files: zero module-level mutable containers.
